OmniIntegrationProcedure.customJavaScript:
{ "applicationId": "a1ccp000000iNs9AAE", "DFDDRCreateServiceApplicationStatus": true, "getOmniInstanceId": [], "getOmniInstanceIdStatus": true, "getAccountDetails": { "ContactLastName": "Dev2Pro2", "ContactName": "Sudhanshu Dev2Pro2", "ContactFirstName": "Sudhanshu", "ContactEmail": "ssvjdev2pro2@yopmail.com", "userAccountId": "001cp000009gbIzAAI" }, "getAccountDetailsStatus": true, "sInstanceId": "", "Acknowledgement": { "VendorPermitsAcknowledgement": { "VendorPermitsAcknowledgementInitials": "asd" }, "ADAAcknowledgement": { "ADAAcknowledgementInitials": "ads" }, "NotifyingofImpact": { "NotifyingofImpactInitials": "dad" }, "CityAgreement": null, "ParkPermitsAcknowledgement": null }, "DocumentUpload": { "FileUpload": {}, "DynamicFileText": "
  • Approval Letter from Alderperson
  • Certificate of Insurance
  • Emergency Plan
  • Event Site Map
  • Alcohol Vendor Names
  • Food and Food Truck Vendor Names
  • Map of your Parade, Run/Walk/Ride Route
  • Traffic Control Plan
    • " }, "MapRoute": true, "Publicity": { "FinancialInfo": { "AdmissionCharged": "Yes" }, "InquiryPhone": "1313123112", "InquiryEmail": "asda@asdas.asda", "PublicizeEvent": "asd" }, "SecuritySafetyProcedures": { "EmergencyMedicalServices": "Yes", "OffDutyOfficer": "Yes", "SecurityEvent": "Yes", "EmergencyPhoneNumber": "2313131231", "EmergencyContactPerson": "asda", "EmergencyAgencyName": "adas", "Messaging9": null, "Policearmed": "Yes", "overnightSecurity": "Yes", "NumberOfPolicePersonnel": 12, "offdutypoliceofficerPhone": "1213123123", "offdutypoliceofficerLastName": "asdas", "offdutypoliceofficerFirstName": "asdsad", "NumberSecurityPersonnel": 12, "SecurityCompanyPhone": "1231321312", "SecurityCompanyName": "asdsa", "Messaging11": null, "Messaging10": null }, "TrashandSanitationRecycling": { "ResponsiblePartyForRecycling": { "RecyclingPersonLastName": "asds", "RecyclingPersonFirstName": "asd", "RecyclingPersonEmail": "asda@asdas.asda", "RecyclingPersonPhone": "1231232131" }, "ResponsiblePartyForTrash": { "TrashPersonPhone": "1231321312", "TrashPersonEmail": "asda@asdas.asda", "TrashPersonLastName": "asda", "TrashPersonFirstName": "asdad" }, "ResponsiblePartyForCleaning": { "CleaningPersonPhone": "1321231231", "CleaningPersonEmail": "asda@asdas.asda", "CleaningPersonLastName": "asd", "CleaningPersonFirstName": "asdas" }, "PortableRestrooms": "Yes", "Location": "asd", "VendorInformation": "asda", "HowManyRooms": "sada" }, "ClosureofInterstatesHighwaysRoutes": { "EventRampHighways": "Yes" }, "UsePublicStreets": { "EventClose": "Yes", "NameTrafficControlCompany": "sad", "ContactTrafficControlCompany": "asd", "StreetDataRepeatableBlock": { "NumberOfDays": "asd", "Blocks": "asda", "Blockswithparkingmeters": "adsdsa", "TrafficLanes": "adasd", "ParkingLanes": "asda", "StreettoReopenTime": "01:30 am", "StreettoReopenDate": "2024-12-01", "StreettoCloseTime": "12:00 am", "StreettoCloseDate": "2024-12-01", "Reasonforblocking": "asd", "CrossStreet2": "asd", "BetweenCrossStreet1": "asda", "StreetToBeBlocked": "asdsa" }, "DescribeParadeWalkDirection": "asdad", "Messaging24": null }, "UseOfPublicPark": { "EventParkSpaceRequire": "No", "ParksDivisionEquipmentRequest": null, "EquipmentDeparmentRequest": null, "LocationinPark": null, "ParkList-Block": null, "Messaging25": true }, "EventDetails": { "Food": { "FoodSold": "Yes, sell", "FoodPropane": "Yes" }, "OtherDetails": { "NotifiedAlderManforEvent": "Yes", "volunteersEvent": "Yes", "merchandisesold": "Yes", "NameCoordinator": "asdas", "volunteersRole": "asdsd" }, "Beverage": { "AlcoholicBeverages": "Yes, sell", "acholicFormula": true }, "BuildingDetails": { "TemporaryEvent": "Yes", "WilltentsErected": "Yes", "WillConstructed": "Yes", "WillGeneratorsUsed": "Yes", "TemporaryContactName": "asdas", "TemporaryEventSize": "12", "Typeoftent": "Self Standing", "HowmanyTents": 12, "TentProviderName": "asd", "TentFootage": "12", "StageSize": "12", "ProvideName": "casda", "Providevendorname": "czca", "HowManyGenerator": "12", "GeneratorSize": "122", "EventActivites": "Pyrotechnics_Fireworks;Carnival_Rides" }, "EventTypeEstimateAttendanceFormula": false, "HowManyPeopleAttendEvent": 121, "largeNumberOfPeople": "Yes", "StreetFormulaforRunAndParade": true, "ParkEventTypeFormula": false, "EventTypeRunWalkRideFormula": true, "EventType": "Run_Walk_Ride;Parade" }, "EventDateTimeDetails": { "LiabilityInsuranceCoverage": { "InitialAgree": "sff" }, "EventBreakdownEndTime": "02:00 am", "EventBreakdownEndDate": "2025-01-23", "EventBreakdownStartTime": "12:00 am", "EventBreakdownStartDate": "2025-01-23", "EventDateTime": [ { "EndTime1": "01:30 am", "StartTime1": "12:30 am", "StartDate1": "2025-01-16" }, { "EndTime1": "01:00 am", "StartTime1": "12:00 am", "StartDate1": "2025-01-17" }, { "EndTime1": "01:00 am", "StartTime1": "12:00 am", "StartDate1": "2025-01-18" }, { "StartTime1": "12:00 am", "EndTime1": "01:00 am", "StartDate1": "2025-01-19" }, { "EndTime1": "01:00 am", "StartTime1": "12:00 am", "StartDate1": "2025-01-20" } ], "EventSetupEndTime": "01:00 am", "EventSetupEndDate": "2025-01-23", "EventSetupStartTime": "12:00 am", "EventSetupStartDate": "2025-01-16", "Messaging7": true, "ValidateBreakdownEndDatewithEventStartDate": false, "Messaging21": true, "ValidateBreakdownDatewithStart": false, "Messaging5": true, "ValidateBreakdownEndDateSetupStartDate": false, "Messaging1": true, "ValidateBreakdownEndStartDate": false, "Messaging3": true, "ValidateDateForSetupBreakdown": false, "Messaging34": true, "ValidateSameBreakdownStratTimeEventStartTime": false, "Messaging31": true, "ValidateGreaterTimeForBreakdown": false, "eventMoreThanFiveDays": true, "EventDateBlockformula": true, "Messaging29": true, "ValidateSetupDatewithEventEndDate": false, "Messaging6": true, "ValidateSetupDatewithEventStartDate": false, "Messaging33": true, "ValidatSetStartTimeEventStartTime": true, "Messaging38": true, "ValidateEventTime5": false, "Messaging37": true, "ValidateEventTime4": false, "Messaging36": true, "ValidateEventTime3": false, "Messaging32": true, "ValidateEventTime2": false, "Messaging35": true, "ValidateEventTime1": false, "Messaging28": true, "ValidateGreaterTimeForSetup": false, "Messaging2": true, "ValidateSetupEndandStartDateFormula": false }, "EventInformation": { "EventDescription": "asdasd", "AttendanceTime": "12:00 am", "EstimatedAttendance": "0 – 200", "EventHeldPast": "Yes", "EventName": "adad", "EstimatedAttendanceRange5000": false, "EstimatedAttendanceRange500": false, "PastEventLocation": "adad", "PastEventDate": "2024-12-02" }, "GeneralInformation": { "PrimaryContactInformation": { "PrimaryContactPhone": "1313213213", "PrimaryContactEmail": "asads@dd.sad", "PrimaryContactLastName": "adad", "PrimaryContactFirstName": "adada" }, "PersonalDetails": { "ZipCode": "4478hh", "StreetAddressLine2": "Street Line 2", "StreetAddressLine1": "Street line 1", "City": "Los Santos", "MobilePhone": "2825553695", "ContactLastName": "Dev2Pro2", "State": "Missouri", "ContactEmail": "ssvjdev2pro2@yopmail.com", "ContactFirstName": "Sudhanshu" }, "IsHostPresent": "Yes", "CompanyOrganizationInformation": { "CompanyOrganizationPhoneNumber": "1313131312", "CompanyOrganizationAddress": "ad", "CompanyOrganizationName": "NXT Cloud Synapps" } }, "IsPersonAccount": "No", "ParkDocumentTemplate": { "Type": "MicrosoftWord", "parkPermitDocName": "Park_Application", "Id": "2dtcp00000018LJAAY", "DocumentGenerationMechanism": "ClientSide", "VersionNumber": 1 }, "StreetDocumentTemplate": { "Type": "MicrosoftWord", "Id": "2dtcp00000018MvAAI", "streetPermitDocName": "Street_Closing_Application", "DocumentGenerationMechanism": "ClientSide", "VersionNumber": 1 }, "SpecialDocumentTemplate": { "Type": "MicrosoftWord", "specialEventDocName": "Special_Event_Application", "Id": "2dtcp00000018JhAAI", "DocumentGenerationMechanism": "ClientSide", "VersionNumber": 1 }, "nextClick": true, "AddressValidation": { "searchAddressLWC": { "key": "896599.79852054222", "y": "1019162.4250790704", "x": "896599.79852054222", "address": "300 S GRAND AVE, 63103" }, "AddressErrorMessage": null, "AddressError": false }, "serviceRecordType": [ { "Id": "012cp000002rsdrAAA", "DeveloperName": "Permits" } ], "recordTypeID": "Permits", "ContactIsPersonAccount": false, "Street": "Street line 1, Street Line 2", "ContactName": "Sudhanshu Dev2Pro2", "StreetPreview": {}, "ParkPermitPreview": null, "userCurrencyCode": "USD", "userProfile": "DFD Portal User Profile", "eventType": "Special Event Permit", "confirmationPageUrl": null, "caseApplicationId": null, "applicationEmail": null, "streetDocumentTitle": null, "streetSelectedTemplate": null, "parkDocumentTitle": null, "parkSelectedTemplate": null, "specialDocumentTitle": null, "specialSelectedTemplate": null, "ContextId": null, "selectedStreet": "300 S GRAND AVE, 63103" }
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: DFDFW Create Service Application

omniProcessElements.name: DFDDRCreateServiceApplication
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "omniInput:MainAccountId" : "=%getAccountDetails:userAccountId%", "omniInput:ContactEmail" : "=%getAccountDetails:ContactEmail%", "selectedStreet" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(%selectedStreet%),%selectedStreet%,\"\")", "instanceId" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(%instanceId%),%instanceId%,\"\")", "applicationId" : "=%getOmniInstanceId:applicationId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "Service_Application_Detail__c_1:Id", "responseJSONNode" : "applicationId", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "omniInput", "bundle" : "DFDFWCreateServiceApplicationRecord", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DFDDRGetServiceApplicationId
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "inputParam" : "applicationId", "element" : "applicationId" } ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: getAccountDetails

omniProcessElements.name: getOmniInstanceId
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DFDFWGetOmniscriptSavedSession", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "inputParam" : "instanceId", "element" : "sInstanceId" } ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: TransformOmniInputForAPIPayload
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "" : "" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "DFDDRGetServiceApplicationId:applicationFormDetails", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DFDFWGetSpecialEventTransform", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: updateServiceApplicationJSON
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "applicationId" : "%applicationId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "omniInput", "remoteClass" : "DFDFW_OMNI_CustomFunctions", "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteMethod" : "UpdateServiceApplicationOmniJson", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: updateServiceApplicationPayloadMappingJSON
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "applicationId" : "%applicationId%", "businessRuleName" : "Create Permit" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "TransformOmniInputForAPIPayload", "remoteClass" : "DFDFW_OMNI_CustomFunctions", "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteMethod" : "updatePayloadMappingJSON", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "RemoteAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }
